subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Praise be to God, thou art the lamp in the nighttime chamber of love and the light of the gathering of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء الحمد لله شمع شبستان محبتی و نور انجمن معرفت
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @nearness and remoteness
